arts.ttl: Christopher Nkunku has just forced Enzo Maresca Chelsea transfer U-turn as new role now clear
arts.sum: Chelsea are asking for north of £60million for Christopher Nkunku this month with Bayern Munich seriously interested in the forward, football.london understands. Talks with the German club are well underway with Chelsea interested in forward Mathys Tel, who signed a contract extension at the Allianz Arena less than 12 months ago.

arts.ttl: How Chelsea would line up with Mathys Tel
arts.sum: The injury prone duo of Reece James and Wesley Fofana remain in Chelsea’s full strength starting XI, with Levi Colwill and Marc Cucurella expected to retain their places at Stamford Bridge. Enzo Fernandez and Moises Caicedo appear to have finally adapted to playing alongside each other, and will therefore keep their spots in central midfield, while Cole Palmer is still the shining light of Chelsea’s team.

arts.ttl: Chelsea deliver Christopher Nkunku transfer ultimatum as January exit demand revealed
arts.sum: Chelsea value Christopher Nkunku at more than £60million, football.london understands, with Bayern Munich interested in a January transfer. Nkunku is often the first choice from the bench but that is not a squad role befitting of a player who was once the jewel of European football during his time at RB Leipzig.
